name: I12: every mutation writes exactly one audit row

expect.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM audit_log WHERE action = 'node.create'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM audit_log WHERE action = 'edge.create'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM audit_log WHERE action = 'node.transition' AND ok = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM audit_log WHERE action = 'node.touch'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM audit_log WHERE action = 'node.surfacing'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM audit_log WHERE meta LIKE '%ZecretPayloadXq%'
